title: 和/或者/但是
prompt_en: Practice connecting ideas with and but or because so.
description: 掌握并列连词和转折连词的基本用法。
knowledge_points: 并列 转折 and but because so

title: 因为/所以
prompt_en: Practice cause and effect with because and so.
description: 掌握因果连接词和复杂句表达。
knowledge_points: 因果 because so 原因 结果

title: 当...时/之前/之后
prompt_en: Practice time clauses with when while before after until.
description: 掌握时间连接词引导的状语从句。
knowledge_points: 时间从句 when while before after

title: 如果/除非
prompt_en: Practice conditional clauses with if and unless.
description: 掌握条件句的基本结构(零条件/第一条件)。
knowledge_points: 条件句 if unless 假设 条件

title: 虽然/尽管
prompt_en: Practice concession with although even though though.
description: 掌握让步连接词的句首和句中用法。
knowledge_points: 让步 although even though 对比

title: 定语从句入门
prompt_en: Practice relative clauses with who which that where.
description: 掌握关系代词引导的定语从句(修饰人/物/地点)。
knowledge_points: 定语从句 who which that where 修饰
